message:
Differentiate scatter backward pass by mode: pass-through gradient for additive scatter

- Check scatter operation mode parameter and compute operand gradient
  accordingly: for mode="add", pass the full gradient through since
  the operand contributes additively at all positions; for mode="overwrite"
  (default), zero out scattered positions since the operand had no
  influence there

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
